2366100.name: A Long Survive
2366100.description:
“It was our fault. Our home, Earth, was attacked and devastated. But we prevailed. We must fight back and make them pay for what they’ve done. We know they’ll attack again. But together, we became a force. We will be prepared. We will survive."

A LONG SURVIVE

A Long Survive is a cooperative survival shooter focused on battling waves of enemies and resource management. You'll need to devise real-time strategies and efficiently build defenses to fortify the area if you want to survive.

Choose from four unique heroes, each with their own special abilities, and unlock powerful skills, weapons and structures through a dynamic progression system.

Will you be able to complete the mission? Will you be able to survive?

JOINS THE SPACE CORP

You will take on the role of a soldier from Space Corp. Your mission will be to team up with other members of the corporation and complete a series of missions. But of course, it won't be easy.

These extraction zones are full of enemies. You’ll have to survive wave after wave while keeping the Nexus safe.

GAME HIGHLIGHTS

  • SURVIVE - PROTECT THE NEXUS.
    You have to survive different waves filled with many enemies with different mechanics that Will attack you relentlessly. And what's more important; you must protect the Nexus. If the Nexus falls, the game is over.

  • MANAGE YOUR RESOURCES – FORTIFY YOUR POSITION.
    You will have a wide variety of weapons to survive. But not only that. Thanks to the "Forge Gun" and the resources you acquire during the game, you can fortify your position. You will have the possibility to build walls, turrets, and many other constructions that will help you protect the nexus.
    Be smart. Use your resources and those of your team strategically.

  • INTENSE GAMEPLAY – (Shooter) REAL-TIME STRATEGY.
    The waves of enemies will become increasingly numerous and difficult. They can attack from different locations. You'll have to adapt to each wave without much reaction time.
    There won't be any break. If you want to survive, you'll have to be quick and effective.

  • COOP - PROGRESSION.
    You are part of a team. Don't forget that. Join online matches with your friends and progress with new weapons, skills and structures.
2366100.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
